The Swipe Files
of the
Copywriting
SuperSTarS
Kent
Komae

-- 1 of 64 --

The Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars
Kent
KOMAE
Bio:
An 11-time award-winning copywriter, Kent has created numerous control pieces for vitamins,
nutritional supplements, health products, and health books for some of the nation’s largest
marketers.
Clients hire Kent and keep booking his schedule because (1) his unique promotions generate
millions of dollars in profits for them; (2) his proven experience dramatically builds businesses
and increases the lifetime value of customers; and (3) his understanding of how to write legally
compliant copy gives his clients great results and peace of mind.
Testimonials:
Legendary!
“Kent Komae’s hard-selling direct mail packages are legendary in the health supplements
industry. His fabled controls … have made him one of the top two or three choices for
supplement companies looking to grow – FAST.”
-- Clayton Makepeace
Copywriter & Publisher, The Total Package
Double the response!
“Kent Komae’s 24-page magalog had a response that doubled our projectsions, with an aver-
age order 25% over objective …. I recommend him very highly.”
-- Glory Kneass
Healthy Directions
You’ve done it again!
“Back in 1996, you wrote the most successful direct mail piece we’ve ever mailed for Sun Chlo-
rella … now your new piece … is generating 25% more than our old control.”
-- Sun Chlorella USA
Contact Info:
16808 Wilkie Ave.
Torrance, CA 90504
Daytime Phone: (310) 719-1270

The Hidden Truth
Why It’s So Hard
to Lose Weight

by:
Kent Komae
